blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 9 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for social media integration.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for social media integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the integration with social media platforms like Instagram and Facebook for booking functionalities. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of concrete evidence to assert either satisfaction or failure of the requirement.
